title: leucas stormsii var. stormsii
intro: Leucas stormsii var. stormsii, also known as 'Dhanyakaravira', is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family and native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria. Leucas stormsii var. stormsii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried powder for use in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
